tumbuka: Manyani kuti mphepo yikuchimbira ku chigaŵa wuli
Lekani kusiya libwe lililose kwambura kuzgoka
Nga ni para munthu wakukwera njinga

english: Like two peas in a pod.
tumbuka: Nga ni nandolo ziŵiri mu mphukira

english: Make hay while the sun shines.

tumbuka: Kamoza kulumika, kaŵiri kuŵa na soni

english: Out of the frying pan and into the fire.
tumbuka: Kufuma mu pani yakuphikira na kunjira mu moto

english: The pot calling the kettle black.
tumbuka: Mphika uwo ukuchema ketulo kuti ngwakufipa

english: There are clouds on the horizon.
Those who live in glass houses shouldn't throw stones.
tumbuka: Awo ŵakukhala mu nyumba za magalasi ŵaleke kuponya malibwe
Kupitilira mu mtundu wakukhora na wakuwonda

english: You can catch more flies with honey than you can with vinegar.
tumbuka: Mungakora ntcheŵe zinandi na uchi kuluska umo mungakora na viniga

english: You can lead a horse to water, but you can't make him drink.
tumbuka: Ungalongozga hachi ku maji, kweni ungamupangiska yayi kuti wamwe maji

english: You can't make an omelet without breaking some eggs.
tumbuka: Mungapanga yayi omelet kwambura kuswa mazira ghanyake

english: a good thing that seemed bad at first.
tumbuka: chinthu chiwemi icho chikawonekanga chiheni pakwamba

english: Avoid saying what you mean, usually because it is uncomfortable.
tumbuka: Lekani kuyowoya ivyo mukukhumba kuyowoya, kanandi chifukwa chakuti vikuŵa vyambura kwenelera

english: Better to arrive late than not to come at all.
tumbuka: Ntchiwemi kufika mwakuchedwa kuluska kuleka kwiza nadi

english: To get something over with because it is inevitable.
tumbuka: Kuti munthu wamalizge chinthu chinyake chifukwa nchambura kuchitika
Lekani kugwira ntchito pa chinthu chinyake

english: Doing something poorly in order to save time or money.
tumbuka: Kuchita chinthu chinyake mwambura kwenelera kuti muleke kuseŵezeska nyengo panji ndalama

english: Do the thing you've been wanting to do so you can move on.
tumbuka: Chitani chinthu icho mwakhala mukukhumba kuchita kuti mulutilire

english: To not hold someone responsible for something.
tumbuka: Kuti munthu waleke kuŵika mulandu pa chinthu chinyake

english: You have to work for what you want.
tumbuka: Mukwenera kugwira ntchito kuti musange ivyo mukukhumba

english: Things are going well so far.
The person we were just talking about showed up!.
You don't notice how long something lasts when it's fun.
tumbuka: Mukumanya yayi kuti chinthu chikukhala nyengo yitali wuli para nchakukondweska
Kupangiska suzgo kuti liŵe likuru chomene

english: Let's not talk about that problem right now.
tumbuka: Tiyeni tileke kuyowoya za suzgo ilo sonosono apa

english: What you have is worth more than what you might have later.
tumbuka: Ivyo muli navyo ni vyakuzirwa chomene kuluska ivyo mungaŵa navyo pamanyuma

english: Money you save today you can spend later.
tumbuka: Ndalama izo mwasunga muhanya uno mungazigwiliskira ntchito pamanyuma

english: Believe what people do and not what they say.
tumbuka: Kugomezga ivyo ŵanthu ŵakuchita, ivyo ŵakuyowoya yayi

english: To make a bad situation worse.
tumbuka: Kuti vinthu viheni viŵe viheni chomene

english: To be mistaken, to be looking for solutions in the wrong place.
tumbuka: Kubudiska kupenja vyakumazga masuzgo mu malo ghambura kwenelera

english: People who are alike are often friends (usually used negatively).
tumbuka: Ŵanthu awo ŵakuyana waka kanandi ŵakuŵa ŵabwezi (kanandi ŵakuyowoyeka mwambura kwenelera)

english: Take on a project that you cannot finish.
tumbuka: Tengani ntchito iyo mungakwaniska yayi kumalizga

english: Comparing two things that cannot be compared.
tumbuka: Kuyaniska vinthu viŵiri ivyo vingayana yayi

english: Do something without having planned beforehand.
tumbuka: Chitani chinthu chinyake kwambura kunozga dankha

english: Treat people fairly. Also known as "The Golden Rule".
tumbuka: Muchitirenge ŵanthu vinthu mwaurunji. Kweniso wakumanyikwa kuti "Dango la Golide"

english: Don't count on something good happening until it's happened.
tumbuka: Lekani kugomezga kuti chinthu chiwemi chizamuchitika m'paka chichitike

english: There's no reason to complain about something that can't be fixed.
tumbuka: Palije chifukwa chakudandawura na chinthu icho chinganozga yayi

english: You're not very good at this.
tumbuka: Muli makora chomene yayi pa ivi

english: What you're doing is too risky.
Good things come after bad things.
tumbuka: Vinthu viwemi vikwiza pamanyuma pa vinthu viheni

english: Get treated the way you've been treating others (negative).
tumbuka: Muchitirikenge umo mukuchitira na ŵanyinu (vyambura kwenelera)

english: He has bigger things to take care of than what we are talking about now.
tumbuka: Wali na vinthu vikuru ivyo wakwenera kuvipwelelera kuluska ivyo tikuyowoya sono

english: The son is like the father.
You're just as bad as I am.
Get two things done with a single action.
tumbuka: Kuchita vinthu viŵiri na chinthu chimoza

english: On probation. If you make another mistake, there will be trouble.
tumbuka: Pa nyengo yakuyezgeka. Usange mwabudiskaso paŵenge suzgo

english: To argue the opposite, just for the sake of argument.
tumbuka: Kuti tisuskane mwakupambana chifukwa cha kususkana waka
Kusunga ndalama zakuti muzakaŵe nazo pamanyuma

english: Reliability is more important than speed.

tumbuka: Lekani kuviwona kuti ni vyakuzirwa chomene

english: It looks good from a distance, but when you look closer, there are problems.
tumbuka: Yikuwoneka makora para uli patali kweni para ukulaŵiska pafupi pali masuzgo

english: The first people who arrive will get the best stuff.
tumbuka: Ŵanthu ŵakwamba awo ŵazamufika ŵazamusanga vinthu viwemi chomene

english: The big issue, the problem people are avoiding.
tumbuka: Nkhani yikuru, suzgo ilo ŵanthu ŵakulipeŵa

english: It's ok to miss this opportunity. Others will arise.
tumbuka: Ni viwemi kuphokwa mwaŵi uwu. Ŵanyake ŵazamuwuka

english: He seems crazy but actually he's clever.
tumbuka: Wakuwoneka nga ni misala kweni ngwamahara

english: This person or thing may look bad, but it's good inside.
tumbuka: Munthu uyu panji chinthu ichi chingawoneka chiheni kweni mukati mwake ntchiwemi

english: People who don't understand something fully are dangerous.
tumbuka: Ŵanthu awo ŵakupulikiska makora yayi chinthu chinyake mbakofya

english: Events have momentum and build upon each other.
tumbuka: Vyakuchitika vikuŵa na nkhongono ndipo vikuzengeka pa vinyake

english: Fix the problem now because it will get worse later.
tumbuka: Munozge suzgo ili sono chifukwa pamanyuma lizamuŵa liheni chomene

english: A big fuss about a small problem.
You can prevent a problem with little effort. Fixing it later is harder.
tumbuka: Mungaŵateteza suzgo mwa kuŵikapo mtima viŵi yayi. Kuyinozga pamanyuma nkhwakusuzga chomene

english: Something bad is coming, but right now it's calm.
tumbuka: Chinthu chiheni chikwiza kweni sonosono apa pali chete

english: Move on, this subject is over.
Everyone gets a chance at least once.
tumbuka: Waliyose wakusanga mwaŵi nanga ni kamoza

english: The better you know someone the less you like him.
tumbuka: Para mukumumanya makora munthu mukumutemwa viŵi yayi

english: Have more energy after having been tired.
tumbuka: Muŵe na nkhongono zinandi para mwavuka
Pulikani nkhani ya chinthu chinyake cha chinsinsi

english: You'll make mistakes if you rush through something.
tumbuka: Muzamubudiska usange mukuchimbilira ku chinthu chinyake
Kuleka kuŵika maghanoghano ghinu ghose pa

english: I'll get you back for what you did.
Hear something from the person involved.
tumbuka: Pulikanipo kanthu kufuma kwa munthu uyo ​​wakukhwaskika

english: He can't make up his mind.
If you can't do the job, don't blame it on others.
tumbuka: Usange mungakwaniska yayi kugwira ntchito mungasuskanga ŵanyinu yayi

english: Things are going to get better.
One person alone isn't responsible. Both people are involved.
tumbuka: Munthu yumoza pera ndiyo wali na mulandu yayi. Ŵanthu wose ŵaŵiri ŵakukhwaskika

english: Follow a trend, do what everyone else is doing.
tumbuka: Londezgani ivyo vikuchitika chitani ivyo waliyose wakuchita
Kupulikiska umo vinthu viliri (kanandi vikuŵa viheni)

english: Something you never forget how to do.
tumbuka: Chinthu icho mungaluwa yayi umo mungachitira

english: Take advantage of a good situation.
You're more cautious when you've been hurt before.
tumbuka: Mukuŵa maso chomene para mwapwetekekapo kale

english: Things are going from bad to worse.
Someone criticizing someone else he is just as bad.
tumbuka: Munthu munyake wakususka munthu munyake nayo ni muheni

english: People who are morally questionable shouldn't criticize others.
tumbuka: Ŵanthu awo ŵakukayikiska nkharo ŵakwenera yayi kususka ŵanyawo

english: In good times and in bad times.
tumbuka: Mu nyengo ziwemi na mu nyengo ziheni

english: Don't waste things and you'll always have enough.
tumbuka: Lekani kutaya vinthu ndipo nyengo zose muŵenge na vyakukwana

english: Getting a good start is important.
Everything is going wrong at once.
You'll get what you want by being nice.
tumbuka: Muzamusanga ivyo mukukhumba mwa kuŵa ŵawemi

english: You can't force someone to make the right decision.
tumbuka: Mungakakamiza cha munthu kuti wasankhe vinthu mwakwenere

english: There's always a cost to doing something.
tumbuka: Nyengo zose pali mtengo wakuchita chinthu
